title: Vicatia millefolia
taxonomy: Vicatia millefolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to New Zealand and is often found in dry to moist areas. Vicatia millefolia is also known as the New Zealand or Māori ironweed, and it is a perennial herb with a distinctive foliage and flower structure. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties and is used in traditional Māori medicine. Vicatia millefolia is also used as a food source by some native birds and insects in its natural habitat.
